title: The Road to Sabaody
description: In the Sabaody Archipelago storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #3, Brook, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #1 as the scene develops across pages 1–4.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You'll do whatever she asks, huh?

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: I'm just a slave to love!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Where are you going on your own!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: even a kid could find his way.

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: I understand- Mated you... sorry, be careful.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: just promise me this one thing.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Like I said before, this island

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Plus there are bounty hunters and kidnappers.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Be really careful, whatever you do.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: 'K... when did you get that wound?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Let's do as the octopus says.
